profile.name: Michael Trent
profile.title: Principal AI/ML Engineer
profile.tagline: Principal AI/ML Engineer with 12+ years delivering RAG-based LLM systems, agentic AI workflows, and production MLOps across healthcare, energy, and regulated enterprise environments.

intro_hero: Principal AI/ML Engineer · RAG, Agentic AI & MLOps

items: AWS SageMaker · Bedrock · Azure ML · OpenAI

pre_end_cards.descHtml: Architect healthcare-grade RAG and LangGraph multi-agent workflows on Azure OpenAI and AWS Bedrock with guardrails for regulated environments.
Build ingestion, embedding, and retrieval pipelines with SageMaker, Azure ML, MLflow, and CI/CD for versioned model deployment and observability.
Deploy containerized inference on AKS/EKS with monitoring for LLM latency, retrieval quality, and drift across 10M+ document corpora.

story-gamification-hero.descHtml:
Technical lead with 12+ years in enterprise AI, ML, and Generative AI across healthcare, energy, and regulated domains.
Delivered RAG-based LLM systems, agentic workflows, and production MLOps on AWS, Azure, and GCP — cutting manual review 30–40% and improving decision accuracy up to 35%.

story-gamification-battle-pass.descHtml: Architected healthcare clinical assistants on Azure OpenAI and energy regulatory RAG on AWS Bedrock — semantic search across 10M+ documents.

story-gamification-ranks.descHtml: TensorFlow, PyTorch, XGBoost, transformers, and time-series forecasting for grid, energy, and clinical AI workloads.

story-gamification-chests.descHtml:
DataCamp — Python & machine learning credentials.

Cleaning Data in Python
Data Types for Data Science in Python
Supervised Learning with scikit-learn

story-gamification-leaderboard.descHtml: Python, RAG/LLM engineering, PyTorch, AWS & Azure MLOps, vector search, and production GenAI — 12+ years in regulated environments.

story-rewards-hero.descHtml: Federal healthcare & energy GenAI — RAG, agentic AI, and production MLOps for regulated enterprise clients.
bullets: Led multi-team delivery of LangChain and LangGraph workflows on Azure OpenAI and AWS Bedrock
Architected vector search with FAISS, Pinecone, and Azure AI Search across 10M+ document corpora
Built FastAPI services and guardrailed retrieval for healthcare clinical decision support
Deployed CI/CD model pipelines with MLflow, drift monitoring, and retrieval-quality observability
Cut manual clinical review 35% with production healthcare RAG across EHR notes and medical literature
Improved decision accuracy up to 35% and accelerated regulatory research 40% on energy programs

story-rewards-referral.descHtml: Hands-on technical lead across Booz Allen's federal AI programs.
bullets: Healthcare: LLM clinical assistants with LangChain, Azure AI Search & FastAPI — guardrailed retrieval over EHR and literature
Energy: regulatory RAG on AWS Bedrock with semantic search over 10M+ filings and compliance documents
Agentic AI: LangGraph multi-agent workflows with policy guardrails for regulated enterprise clients
Platform: retrieval-quality observability, prompt versioning, model evaluation & responsible-AI controls

story-rewards-cashback.descHtml: Renewable energy and electricity-market analytics — forecasting, pricing models, and early GenAI retrieval.
bullets: Built wind, solar & grid forecasting pipelines on AWS SageMaker and PyTorch for trading and operations teams
Developed electricity price & demand models with PySpark, Azure ML, and time-series feature engineering
Prototyped early GPT-3 + FAISS retrieval for energy-market intelligence and unstructured regulatory data
Shipped one of the firm's first production GenAI retrieval systems — turning unstructured energy data into actionable forecasts

story-rewards-staking.descHtml: Utility analytics and regulatory intelligence — AMI-scale forecasting, NLP, and production ML platforms.
bullets: Scaled AMI load forecasting across millions of smart-meter endpoints with distributed PySpark pipelines
Built NLP document intelligence for regulatory filings, compliance workflows, and unstructured utility data
Containerized production ML with MLflow, Airflow, and AWS — versioning, monitoring, and automated retraining
Drove $1M+ in client recoveries and daily processing of millions of AMI records for billing accuracy

story-rewards-community.descHtml: Graduate research in computational neuroscience — the foundation for 12+ years in production ML and GenAI.
bullets: Computational neuroscience research bridging machine learning and biomedical signal analysis
Published methods for time-series forecasting and pattern detection in neural recording data
M.S. Business Analytics — University of Colorado Denver (2016–2020): enterprise analytics & decision science
Ph.D. in AI (in progress) — continuous research in agentic AI, RAG evaluation, and production LLM deployment

story-airdrops-post-hero.descHtml:
Python, LangChain, PyTorch, SageMaker, Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, MLflow, Airflow,
Docker, Kubernetes, vector DBs, and full-stack ML platform delivery.

story-airdrops-post-seasons.descHtml: 10M+ documents indexed · 30–40% less manual review · up to 35% better decision accuracy · 40% faster regulatory research.

story-airdrops-pre-hero.descHtml: University of Colorado — analytics, neuroscience, mathematics, and doctoral AI research.

story-airdrops-pre-engagement.descHtml: Continuously exploring new AI, LLM, and cloud technologies — staying hands-on with emerging tools to grow as a technical leader and deliver greater impact.
